channel.title: The Morning Bloom
channel.description: Daily news briefing — AI & Technology, Books & Publishing, Recruitment & HR. Pune Edition.

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Tuesday, July 21, 2026
item.description: AI's Wall Street moment: OpenAI & Anthropic eye IPOs · AMD's Helios lands Microsoft in strike at Nvidia · Silicon supply side: Alphabet's leaner chip, TSMC's $265B Arizona bet · Publishing's labor summer: record union at Hachette · India's fresher windows open — against a skills gap
